termsAcceptMediScan: By using MedScan, you accept these terms of use.
installDesc: Add MedScan to your home screen
installModalTitle: Install the app on your mobile
installDesktopHint: Open this page on your phone to see the instructions for your device.
installAndroidPrereq: Requirement: You must use Chrome to install the app.
installAndroidStep1: Open this page in Chrome (not Firefox, Samsung Internet, etc.)
installAndroidStep2: If this button is available, click it to install directly
installAndroidStep3: Otherwise: Menu (3 dots) → "Add to Home screen"
installIOSImportant: Important: Installation only works with Safari. Do not use Chrome or other browsers.
installIOSStep1: Open this page in Safari (not Chrome)
installIOSStep2: Tap the Share icon (square with upward arrow)
installIOSStep3: Scroll and select "Add to Home Screen"
installIOSStep5: The MedScan icon will appear on your home screen
installIOSStoryHint: These instructions can be accompanied by story-format images for visual guidance.
installPromptMessage: Would you like to install the app on your phone for quick access?
medicationRecorded: Your medication intake has been recorded
confirmDeleteReminder: Are you sure you want to delete this reminder?
clickPlusToAdd: Click the + button to add a reminder
reminderCreatedDesc: You will be notified to take your medication.
doctorGreeting: Hello, I am Dr. Sarah Martin
doctorDescription: Your dedicated pharmaceutical assistant. I am here to answer all your questions about your medications, interactions, dosage, and much more, with kindness and professionalism.
faqQuestion1: Can I take ibuprofen with paracetamol?
faqQuestion2: What are the side effects of amoxicillin?

errorNetworkMessage: Check your internet connection and try again.

scanTip2: Make sure the medication name is visible
scanTip4: Photograph the box or leaflet if possible
offlinePharmacyHint: Last saved data. View your medications without connection.
onboardingDesc1: Take a photo and our AI identifies your medication instantly.
onboardingDesc2: Ask questions and get reliable, personalized answers.
onboardingDesc3: Set reminders and track your daily adherence.
onboardingDesc4: Full history, interactions, and detailed information always accessible.
onboardingDesc5: Secure data, verified information, caring guidance.
trialOrSignInTitle: Do you want to discover more?
trialOrSignInSubtitle: Try the app with 5 free scans, or create an account to unlock everything.
trialModeLimited: Trial: 5 scans, no save or reminders.
trialNotAvailable: Trial mode is not available. Please sign in or create an account.
upgradeMessage: Create an account in a few seconds to unlock everything. No commitment.
helpSupportContent:
Need assistance with MedScan?

You can ask your medical questions directly in our Virtual Doctor Chat tab.

For any other questions or technical support, contact us by email at: support@medscan.com
aboutContent:
MedScan is your smart pocket medical assistant.

Scan any medication to instantly identify its molecules, contraindications, and correct dosage.

Developed by healthcare and AI professionals to simplify the understanding of your treatments.
termsContent:
By using MedScan, you agree to use the app for educational medical information research.

The app in no way replaces the advice or diagnosis of a professional physician.

You are responsible for verifying the accuracy of prescribed dosages with your pharmacist.
privacyContent:
Your personal and medical data is encrypted and securely stored locally.

We never sell or share your medical information with third parties.

Your scanned images are only used for real-time analysis and remain confidential.
confirmDeleteAccountDesc: This action is irreversible. All your local and profile data will be permanently deleted from Firebase and the phone.
confirmLogout: Are you sure you want to log out?
trialRemindersDesc: Create an account to receive daily medication reminders.
trialGemsBenefit: Your account benefits from 30 free gems offered each day for your diagnostics.
chatNoGems: You have no gems left to chat. They will reload automatically at midnight.
